# Sidqly Public Website
Canonical URL: https://sidqly.com
Description: Sidqly is a premium global Islamic operating platform for verified giving, manual payment review, proof approval, and dignity-safe impact updates.

This site permits AI and search engine crawlers to crawl, index, summarize, and cite public website content.

# Sidqly
> Production URL: https://sidqly.com
> Project Stack: React 19, Vite 6, Tailwind CSS, Firebase Ecosystem

## Description
Sidqly is an optimized, high-performance web platform built utilizing cutting-edge client-side rendering architecture. The interface provides user-centric experiences, engineered for speed, responsiveness, and minimal layout shift.

## Core Features
- Modern Application Interface: Powered by React 19 concurrent rendering.
- Scalable Cloud Backed Infrastructure: Hosted globally via Firebase CDN network nodes.
- High SEO Visibility: Fully compliant semantic DOM structure accessible cleanly to search indexers.

Available summaries and context files:
- /ai-summary.md
- /company-profile.md
- /product-overview.md
- /use-cases.md
- /pricing-summary.md
- /faqs-summary.md
- /trust-and-safety.md
- /schema-map.md
- /blog-index.md
- /ai-crawlers-policy.md
- /regions-index.md
- /modules-index.md
- /solutions-index.md
- /contact-summary.md
- /resources-index.md
- /comparison-summary.md
- /request-organization-summary.md
- /implementation-summary.md
- /glossary-summary.md
